description: Inngest is a durable workflow and event-driven execution platform for building background jobs, multi-step workflows, and AI application pipelines. It provides cloud and local development tooling for sending events, invoking functions, and monitoring runs.
summary: Inngest exposes a REST API for cloud/dev-server management, a local dev-server MCP endpoint, and an installable CLI that wraps the v2 REST API; no public GraphQL API was documented.
